title: pacach #6452
definition:
1) to pass over, spring over
    1a) (Qal) to pass over
    1b) (Piel) to skip, pass over
 2) to limp
    2a) (Qal) to limp
    2b) (Niphal) to be lame
    2c) (Piel) to limp
